text:
was a former Marleyan soldier who served on Marley's Navy and was part of a survey fleet sent to Paradis Island after the failed Paradis Island Operation. After being taken captive on the island, he began working as a waiter in a restaurant inside the Walls.

Appearance

Griez was a young man with dark hair, which was kept closely shaved. He had originally only been seen wearing waiter's clothes. After he was freed from the restaurant by members of the Yeagerists, he wore a dark jacket and pants like the other Anti-Marleyan Volunteers.

Personality

Greiz was characterized, just like many of his countrymen, by his severe anti-Eldian sentiment. Despite having been captured and forced to live on the island, which could have made him see that the Eldians living where just human beings like everybody else in the world, something that has been the case with multiple captured Marleyans on the island, he still continued to hold on to his ingrained fanatical hatred towards Subjects of Ymir.

He was a close comrade of Niccolo. When his friend started to grow close to the Eldians and even fell in love with one, he used to talk about her all night, which caused Greiz to develop extreme contempt towards him for having betrayed their homeland of Marley in his eyes.

By the time he joined the Anti-Marleyan Volunteers, Greiz developed into being a very cold man, having no qualms in betraying Niccolo due to his attitude towards Eldians. He was also very vulgar in his words when it came to insulting Eldians, as seen when he insulted Sasha in front of Nicolo and her family of being a "whore", a "tramp", and a "filthy daughter of devils" with visible frustration, demonstrating how deep his resentment for Subjects of Ymir went.

Story

War for Paradis arc

Griez is among the Marleyan soldiers who are dispatched as part of a fleet to survey Paradis Island, and is summarily captured by the Eldians living on the island. He is put to work as a waiter in a restaurant run by his fellow soldier Niccolo.

While waiting on a group of Military Police Brigade officials, Griez is ordered to bring them more wine, and goes to retrieve a specific bottle from Niccolo.

When a group of officers from the Survey Corps come to visit Niccolo at his restaurant, Griez tells Niccolo and contacts the Yeagerists to inform them of the officers' location. After the group arrives, Griez helps them arrest the Corps officers. The officers try to warn them about the threat posed by Zeke's spinal fluid being distributed throughout the Walls, but Griez dismisses the threat as a mere theory dreamed up by Niccolo.

Griez comes with Onyankopon and Yelena in prison to see Niccolo and the other prisoners. When Niccolo wonders if they will become the new rulers of Paradis after the plan by Zeke and Eren is put into effect, he begins to insult Niccolo for siding with the Eldians. Griez goes on to recall how Niccolo talked about Sasha every night and insults her legacy by calling her a whore and a filthy island devil; before he can say anything else, he is immediately shot in the head by Yelena.

Triva
